ddls:
CREATE TABLE "videos" (
  "video_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each video */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the video */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL link to the video content */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the video was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the video details were last updated */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the video in minutes */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the video content */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the video belongs to */,
  "difficulty_level" TEXT /* Difficulty level of the video (e.g., beginner, intermediate, advanced) */,
  "thumbnail_url" TEXT /* URL to the thumbnail image of the video */,
  "views_count" INTEGER /* Total number of views the video has received */,
  "likes_count" INTEGER /* Total number of likes the video has received */,
  "dislikes_count" INTEGER /* Total number of dislikes the video has received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("video_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_videos_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., employee, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the user account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user enrolled in the video */,
  "video_id" INTEGER /* ID of the video the user is enrolled in */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date when the user enrolled in the video */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the enrollment (e.g., active, completed) */,
  "progress_updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the enrollment progress was last updated */,
  "enrollment_type" TEXT /* Type of enrollment (e.g., mandatory, optional) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_video_id FOREIGN KEY ("video_id") REFERENCES videos ("video_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bookmarks" (
  "bookmark_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bookmark */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the bookmark */,
  "video_id" INTEGER /* ID of the video that is bookmarked */,
  "bookmark_date" TEXT /* Date when the bookmark was created */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments the user can add to the bookmark */,
  "last_accessed" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last time the bookmarked video was accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bookmark_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookmarks_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookmarks_video_id FOREIGN KEY ("video_id") REFERENCES videos ("video_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing feedback */,
  "video_id" INTEGER /* ID of the video the feedback is related to */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments left by the user */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user (1 to 5) */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was provided */,
  "likes" INTEGER /* Number of likes the feedback has received */,
  "dislikes" INTEGER /* Number of dislikes the feedback has received */,
  "is_flagged" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the feedback has been flagged for review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_video_id FOREIGN KEY ("video_id") REFERENCES videos ("video_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics record */,
  "video_id" INTEGER /* ID of the video being tracked */,
  "views" INTEGER /* Total views of the video */,
  "completion_rate" REAL /* Percentage of users who completed the video */,
  "last_accessed" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last access for the video */,
  "total_likes" INTEGER /* Total number of likes the video has received */,
  "total_dislikes" INTEGER /* Total number of dislikes the video has received */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating of the video */,
  "total_comments" INTEGER /* Total number of comments on the video */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_video_id FOREIGN KEY ("video_id") REFERENCES videos ("video_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "discussions" (
  "discussion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each discussion entry */,
  "video_id" INTEGER /* ID of the video the discussion is about */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user participating in the discussion */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message posted in the discussion */,
  "discussion_date" TEXT /* Date when the message was posted */,
  "likes" INTEGER /* Number of likes the discussion message has received */,
  "dislikes" INTEGER /* Number of dislikes the discussion message has received */,
  "is_flagged" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the discussion message has been flagged for review */,
  "parent_discussion_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent discussion message to support nested discussions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("discussion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_discussions_parent_discussion_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_discussion_id") REFERENCES discussions ("discussion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_discussions_video_id FOREIGN KEY ("video_id") REFERENCES videos ("video_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_discussions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., employee, admin) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role assignment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user assigned a role */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "assigned_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was assigned to the user */,
  "assigned_by" INTEGER /* ID of the administrator who assigned the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_progress" (
  "progress_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the progress record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user whose progress is being tracked */,
  "video_id" INTEGER /* ID of the video the progress is associated with */,
  "progress_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the video completed by the user */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last progress update */,
  "last_played_position" INTEGER /* Last position in the video where the user stopped watching */,
  "is_completed" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the video has been completed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("progress_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_progress_video_id FOREIGN KEY ("video_id") REFERENCES videos ("video_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_progress_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)
